title: gpt-image-2
prompt:
Primary request: A clean editorial information-graphic on a warm off-white paper background — flat, NO glow, NO luminous effects, matching a flat editorial info-graphic cover language. Top header reading EXACTLY "COLLABORATIVENESS" in bold modern sans-serif, all caps, deep ink. Below, a small italic subtitle reading EXACTLY "Even weaker models help a stronger aggregator." in deep ink.

The main composition is split into two zones, separated by generous whitespace. LEFT ZONE (the visual): three reference model nodes of clearly varying sizes arranged in a composition — the top one largest (slate blue), the middle medium (terracotta), the bottom one clearly smallest (sage green), suggesting a weaker individual model. Each reference node is a clean filled circle with a thin outer ring, containing the recognizable brand logo in white/light: the OpenAI flower/knot for the top node, the deepseek flame/whale mark for the middle node, the xAI X mark for the bottom node. Each labeled reading EXACTLY "gpt-5.5", "deepseek-v4-pro", and "grok-4" inside or immediately beside its circle. Thin clean lines from each of the three circles converge into a single larger central circle (the aggregator) in deep warm charcoal with a thin outer ring, labeled reading EXACTLY "AGGREGATOR" with "claude-opus-4.8" beneath. A small annotation near the smallest sage node reading EXACTLY "weaker, but still contributes" with a thin dashed line pointing to it. A small uppercase section label reading EXACTLY "VISUAL" above this left zone.

RIGHT ZONE (the data evidence): a clean small data panel with a thin precise border. Inside the panel, a small uppercase header reading EXACTLY "EVIDENCE · ALPACAEVAL 2.0". Below, two comparison rows: row one reading EXACTLY "Open-source MoA" with the value reading EXACTLY "65.1%" highlighted in a distinct muted accent; row two reading EXACTLY "GPT-4o (single model)" with the value reading EXACTLY "57.5%" in a neutral muted tone. Below the rows, a thin separator rule, then a single emphasized line reading EXACTLY "+7.6 pts" in a distinct accent color, with a small label reading EXACTLY "LC win rate gap" beneath it. A small uppercase section label reading EXACTLY "DATA" above this right zone.

Crisp legible verbatim text throughout. Limited warm palette (slate blue, terracotta, sage, deep warm charcoal, deep ink, warm off-white, with one muted accent for the highlighted numbers). Clean precise editorial info-graphic style, structured and information-dense. Generous whitespace, no decorative noise, no human figures, no robots, no logos.
Style/medium: clean editorial information-graphic, flat, light warm off-white background, structured two-zone layout, precise typography, information-dense, no glow no luminous
